reviews.text: The place looks nothing like the photos, the bed linens smell bad, I stayed for 7 days and they didn't even change the bed linens or towels, the night receptionist is super rude. They advertise a full-price day but you can only stay in the room for two hours (okay, my mistake for not getting the details right) and then they made me pay more than double to use the room for 24 hours. They say they don't accept cards to make you pay a withdrawal fee, but they don't use the card machine because they don't want to. Without a doubt, it was the worst place and worst experience of a long trip of more than 3 months through Southeast Asia.

reviews.title: Avoid this hotel. Runaway!
reviews.text:
This was the worst hotel experience. Here are the worst that I had to experience :
1.) they take several days to respond in emails or chats
2.) location is very difficult to find
3.) the reception is almost always empty. Maybe short-staffed. You will need 3-5 to press buzzer before someone will arrive to accommodate you
4.) staff cannot speak English well
5.) room is very very dirty, messy and with foul smell. There will be so many stains, and dirts on pillows, bed cover, blanket and curtains. The bed also finds several hairs and debris of unknown substances.
6.) all towels are dirty and with stains all over it. Despite asking for replacement, the new parts are horrible similar to the previous case.
7.) you will hear all weird sounds from all rooms: adjacent, top and bottom
8.) misleading ads in booking apps. Don't be fooled with their beautiful photos. 

Really disappointed with cleanliness of this hotel as they don't even pass the basic standards of sanitary procedures. Stay away from this hotel at all cost.

reviews.title: Worst stay of my trip
reviews.text:
Don't like leaving bad reviews but this stay was a horror. I arrived after a delayed flight and no one was around to check me in. I rang the bell but no one answered and none of the three whatsapp help numbers provided worked. There were three keys on the desk which after 30 minutes of being unable to contact anyone I took and tried each of them figuring maybe they had just been left out for late check-in. They all opened a room which already had people staying inside it,  which is obviously not very 
secure. After trying to find somewhere else to stay I used the hotel next doors phone to finally get in contact with the night manager. I was informed that I had booked the wrong room and the room I had booked could only be bought for 2 hours at a time which while entirely my fault is also very seedy. I paid extra (not that much admittedly) to stay in a room overnight. Thank you to the night manager for accommodating me and amending my mistake. However the room was quite grotty and very small, nothing like the photos on agoda. There was lots of hair on the floor and bed. I'd hate to think what the room would have looked like under a blacklight. When i did the obligatory bed bug check i was suprised to find the mattress underneat the dirty sheet was actually quite new and very clean, so points for that! The toilet/shower was dirty and I tried to avoid using it. I checked out as soon as I woke up. Overall just would not recommend, bit of a dive tourist trap. Glad to be out of there.
reviews.room_type: Day Use - Double Room - Max 2 Hours Stay

reviews.title: Disappointed
reviews.text:
As my friends were staying here, I wanted to be in the same place as them, but, the only room I could book for the three nights was a family suite.   Yes a suite of one relatively cramped room with two large beds, and one of them had a reddish stain on the sheets... thankfully it was near the pillow so I saw it on entering the room.  However, there was a problem with my friend's booking as they had booked a triple room, and only received a queen bed.  They were staying one/two nights, I was staying three nights.  Of course we had to swap rooms, but nothing was said to me about the change by the hotel.  The new room was big enough for 1 person, no problem.  The cleanliness of that room wasn't so good, and it smelt musty (which is probably common for this type of hotel), and one of the drawers was half missing the bottom of it.  After locating someone at the check-in I finally managed to get a remote control for the aircon as that had gone missing and even though I had looked practically everywhere in the room, the lady had to check every drawer and location as well when she got to the room.
Not a pleasant experience overall to be honest.

reviews.title: Dirty, damp add very badly managed and maintained.  Not recommended!
reviews.text:
The one star is for the bed, which was comfortable for sleep.
To explain the review title:
1. No communication from staff, after e-mail contact with reception.
2. No welcome to the premises or any explanation of rooms, facilities or issue resolution.
3. Incorrect small and dirty room initially allocated. Needed complaint.
4. Second room had a dead / inoperable TV, a dirty fridge with a cockroach inside, no lighting in the bathroom area, bar a plug-in light bulb. Clearly a safety hazard. Another complaint. Nothing done to correct any issue, despite 5 days’ stay.
5. The floor was full of dirt, old hair and other debris. Another complaint. Floor finally cleaned on Day#3. 
6. The ‘service’ was dependent upon complaining to the front desk reception ‘manager’ . No initiative from staff to please. Even toilet roll and a tea cup had to be requested!
An absolute disaster of a ‘hotel’, which I would not recommend to my worst enemy, let alone relatives, friends and colleagues.
There are far better stays and this place gives Hanoi a bad name. 
Steer very clear of the 1961 Old Quarter Hotel.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Window

reviews.title: Disappointment and will never come back.
reviews.text: I decided to book Hotel Old Quarter 1961 because of the positive reviews I saw, but I was disappointed when I arrived. I booked through Agoda, and the photos on the site are completely different from what I received when I checked into my room. I booked a Deluxe room with a window, but that window opens directly into a door that hits the receptionist standing there, making it essentially a window that offers no view. I checked in late at 9:30 PM and was assigned room 101 on the right side. As soon as I opened the door, a musty smell hit me, very unpleasant; everything in the room was rusty and dirty. I told the receptionist why I was assigned this room and why it didn't match the pictures. Initially, I thought it was because I checked in late and the other rooms were full, but the receptionist said all the rooms on their side were like that. They suggested that if I didn’t like it, they would return my money because that was all they had. Since it was already late, I couldn't book elsewhere, so I asked if I could change to another room. In the end, they moved me to Family Room 303 with two beds, which was slightly better than the previous room. I'm not sure if they change the bed linens there, but honestly, the bed sheets had stains like coffee, and the TV remote and air conditioning remote were all dusty, with the window sills covered in dirt and cigarette ash. Just like the name of the hotel suggests, you can keep the old equipment, but please clean and maintain it regularly. Goodbye, and I will never return.

reviews.title: Dirty room and awkward communication
reviews.text:
Before arriving in Hanoi I wanted to book their car for transportation from the airport to the hotel. I got no reply.
The bathroom was dirty, but absolutely the worst thing was the condition of the small fridge. When I opened it there was a terrible smell. It turned out there was rotting food in it, while the fridge was switched off. There were also dead insects in it and in the room were several flies. I asked someone at the front desk to clean it. A guy picked it up and returned it not so long later. What he had done was take out the food and that was it. Still the smell, still the dead insects. At that point I did not have any confidence in having it properly cleaned, so I just did not use it.
AFTER I had checked out I finally received a reply about the airport car, in the evening. The answer was just "yes", three days too late.

reviews.title: Must Read!
reviews.text: If you are seeking for budget hotel, please be mindful this hotel is not considered as hotel and I would say motel. Location is good but taxis can’t get into the alley of the hotel point. So if you have large baggages, please note this. For my room, TV is not working and the mini fridge isn’t either. The photos they uploaded online is way different than the actual room. Most of the time, there is no receptionist and there will be a Vietnamese woman who can’t speak English. And the worst part about is they will confuse you with low budget room which actually is “max 2 hours stay” room but still allow to let you book as many nights possible and once you get there, they gonna just say it’s for 2 hours and if you want to stay night, that’s gonna be 650 or 700 K VND . In my case, I demanded for a night stay in exchange of those three nights fare(max 2 hrs room) I paid. And there are couple of guests experiencing same as me I witnessed. So when you book the room, please check carefully .So far my experience during my stay there, rooms are not sound proof and no housekeeping. I even found a cockroach in my room which even got onto my shoulder eww.  No offense but sharing my honest experience and I believe it’s helpful.

reviews.text: I will not book this hotel again. The thing is I had booked for 2 nights but due to some circumstances, I only stayed for 1 night and I called to inform the hotel. They asked me to pay for a new room because this room was more expensive. But the hotel was at fault, not me. After some explanation, the hotel agreed that I didn't need to pay extra. However, I was not satisfied with the owner's attitude; she spoke very unpleasantly. That night I arrived to check in. The next morning, the room had a power outage, and it took me 30 minutes to resolve it. The strange thing is that only my room lost power while the elevator was still functioning normally. I hope this is an unforeseen incident, but if someone intentionally caused this, then this hotel deserves no stars.

reviews.title: great deal in a good location!
reviews.text: Booked this last minute and stayed for the rest of my Ha Noi trip since my other booking got cancelled. We arrived pretty late and had to wait a bit but was able to contact the receptionist via Whatsapp and had a smooth check in. It’s a great place to just rest if you’re out most of the day - there’s a heater in the shower, AC & really nice lighting in the room we stayed in. The location was walkable to everywhere we visited on our trip which was more or less 10 mins only! It’s just tucked away in an alley so might be confusing to find but look out for the sign! Would stay here again on my next trip!

reviews.title: Great for the money
reviews.text: In a great location, comfy bed and a good shower. Staff were helpful especially when I had locked myself out of my bag and he took my bag to get the padlock cut no problem. Outside of the hotel is the best Bun Cha I’ve ever tasted for just 40,000 Dong. My only issue was you could hear everything outside the room but that’s not really a problem as in the nighttime it’s pretty quiet anyway. I’d stay here again.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Window

reviews.title: Amazing location, inexpensive, old building, good room, not much else but all I wanted or needed
reviews.text:
Perfect for me.  Building is very old and room showed its age in some obvious ways, but not dirty or gross at all, IMHO.  Linens were fresh and crisp.  Decent pillows (I'm picky).  Nice to have a little refrigerator  (just remember to plug it in).  Bathroom was adequate, and clean, just...old.

Great base to explore from for three days.  So much good sight seeing and food...and coffee!  I even got used to the traffic...mostly.  Just remember, when they beep at you (a couple hundred times a day) they're just letting you know they see you, not telling you to move necessarily.  Unless they are!  Good fun...just follow an old lady if you get stuck.

I would not hesitate to return.

reviews.title: Estafa/Scam
reviews.text: Hice una reserva por 4 noches en este hotel y al llegar al lugar la persona de recepción nos dice que la reserva era solo para uso de 2 horas diurnas por dia (en la captura de pantalla dice 4 noches y luego 2 horas de uso, extraño y dudoso) como llegamos a las 5 am no quisimos movernos y perder el dinero pagado (***) asi que debimos pagar un adicional de *** para poder quedarnos. Al llegar a la habitación el lugar se caía a pedazos, en nuestra estancia allí aparecieron 3 o 4 cucarachas y era evidente que había ratas dando vueltas por el cielo raso con acceso al placard porque había restos de madera mordida y por la noche se las escuchaba andar. Se puede comparar con las fotos que subí, la habitación que recibimos y la habitación que promocionan (la última foto) TOTALMENTE DIFERENTE. ME SENTI ESTAFADA. Ademas en el pasillo del hotel había olor a orina. Lo único bueno a destacar es la ubicación a solo unas cuadras del centro y que tenía aire acondicionado.
reviews.room_type: Day Use - Double Room - Max 2 Hours Stay
